goal: After creating a draft, the user-facing report must include the Spark deep link as a clickable markdown link.
context:
You just ran:
$ spark draft --reply-to 3321 --body 'Legal is reviewing...'

ID: 4470
Link: https://sparkmailapp.com/dpl/bl?token=EXAMPLE4470
user: (Report back to the user that the draft is ready.)
